title: leontodon intermedius
intro: Leontodon intermedius, also known as intermediate hawk's beard or hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leontodon intermedius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. Leontodon intermedius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its potential anti-cancer and antibacterial properties.
